app.name: Quran Ayah Finder
app.description: Describe your problem, feeling, or verse number in any language — our AI finds the exact Quranic solution. 100% free, no ads.

features.title: AI Search
features.desc: Ask any question naturally in any language

features.title: Complete Quran
features.desc: 114 Surahs, 30 Juz with authentic Uthmani script

features.title: 6 Dua Categories
features.desc: Forgiveness, Guidance, Protection, Patience, Family, Gratitude

features.title: 12+ Translations
features.desc: English, Bengali, Urdu, German, French, Indonesian & more

features.title: Tafsir
features.desc: Ibn Kathir, Ahsanul Bayaan, Al Jalalayn, Al Waseet, As Saadis

features.title: Reciters
features.desc: Al Afasy and Mishari ibn Rashid al-Afasy for sleep

features.title: Bookmarks
features.desc: Save and organize your favorite verses & Duas

features.title: Daily Verse
features.desc: Verse of the Day with full Tafsir included

features.title: Streak Tracking
features.desc: Build daily Quran reading habits and track progress

features.title: Dark Mode
features.desc: Comfortable night reading with full dark theme

features.title: Localization
features.desc: 6+ languages: English, বাংলা, Deutsch, français & more

topSearches.query: What Allah said about ongoing charity?
How should I treat my parents?

testimonials.text: I typed 'killing an innocent soul' and got An-Nisaa:93 and Al-Maida:32. The AI understands exactly what I'm looking for. This app is a true blessing.
testimonials.name: Muhammad R.

testimonials.text: The streak feature keeps me coming back daily. 3 minutes a day has completely changed my relationship with the Quran. Alhamdulillah!
testimonials.name: Fatima K.

testimonials.text: Finally an app with authentic Tafsirs and multiple translations. The Mushaf mode feels just like reading from a physical Quran. Highly recommended!
testimonials.name: Abdullah M.

seo.title: Quran Ayah Finder — AI-Powered Quranic Guidance App
seo.description: Find Quranic answers to any question in any language. AI-powered verse search, 12+ translations, authentic Tafsirs, Dua categories, streak tracking. 100% free, no ads.
seo.keywords: Quran app, Quran search, Islamic app, Quranic guidance, AI Quran, find verses, Duas, Tafsir, Muslim app
